About Vista Studio

We make properties
impossible to ignore

Vista Studio is a real estate content agency based in Boca Raton, Florida. We specialize in cinematic property videos and social media content that helps realtors attract more buyers, grow their Instagram presence, and build a personal brand that converts.

Every video is shot with professional cinema equipment — not an iPhone. The difference shows, and so do the results.

Sony A7C — Full-frame cinema quality
iPhone 15 Pro — Dynamic BTS & reels
Adobe Premiere Pro + AI editing
Serving Boca Raton & South Florida
